title: Cobblemon Trainer Doubles
description: Applies Doubles Format to all possible trainers in the radical cobblemon trainers mod
body:
Changes every trainer except for the ones that are already on doubles or that have only 1 pokemon to doubles format.

This is for the people that don't want to go through the hassle of manually changing every trainer into a doubles trainer. 

### **If the mod doesn't seem to work, manually enabling it as a datapack should fix the issue. I made a quick written guide below!**

**Download the datapack version and go into your world > datapacks folder, in there add a folder and name it. Then drop the contents of the zip file into said folder.**

**When you enter your world enable it by using the command /datapack enable "file/FOLDERNAME"**

Enjoy!

With 1.7 being out ill keep an eye out if anything needs to be updated!

Credits & Rights to **@hd42** for the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod
